title: Skillable Reforged
description: Skillable mod has arrived for Minecraft 1.20.1! Most of the original features have now been implemented, and more are planned for the future!
body:
# Skillable Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1

Skillable mod has arrived for Minecraft 1.20.1! Most of the original features have now been implemented, and more are planned for the future!

## About Skillable  
Skillable is a progression control system with eight different skills. Players need to level up these skills to unlock stronger tools, weapons, or more advanced blocks. Currently controllable content includes:
- **Block destruction**
- **Attacking entities**
- **Tool and weapon usage**

All features can be configured in the configuration files, including level requirements and suitable entities.

## Modified Vanilla Behavior  
- Items and blocks cannot be used or placed unless the required skill level has been reached.
- Higher-level entities cannot be attacked unless the required skill level is reached.
- Sheep no longer drop wool when killed (configurable).

## How to Use  
Press the “G” key in-game to open the Skill panel. The skill panel will show:
- Your current level
- The level required to upgrade to the next level
- And more...

When you reach the required level, the number will turn green, and you can click the corresponding skill button to upgrade.

## Configuration  
### Skill Locks
Skill locks can configure:
- Item or weapon usage requirements
- Entity attack level requirements

The `attack_skill_locks.json` file can configure attack level requirements for entities.  
The `craft_skill_locks.json` is not yet implemented.  
The `skill_locks.json` file can configure usage requirements for any item or block, with default examples already included.

## Bug Fixes  
- Fixed a crash or infinite loading bug when entering the End Portal after killing the Ender Dragon.
- Fixed some potential bugs where players could not respawn after death.

## Performance Improvements  
- Significantly optimized performance in Creative mode Inventory. More optimizations are expected in the future.

## Future Plans  
- Adding additional features.
- Adding more mod compatibility.

## Credits  
This mod is inspired by the original mod created by Vazkii, with additional inspiration from Reskillable and notmajik’s Rereskillable.
